data.title: DRI Healthcare Trust Reports FDA Delay on KalVista’s Sebetralstat Decision
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from DRI Healthcare ( ($TSE:DHT.UN) ).

DRI Healthcare Trust announced that KalVista Pharmaceuticals received a notice from the FDA indicating a delay in the PDUFA goal date for sebetralstat due to resourcing constraints. The FDA has not requested additional data and expects to make a decision within four weeks, which may impact KalVista’s market positioning and stakeholder expectations.

The most recent analyst rating on ($TSE:DHT.UN) stock is a Hold with a C$15.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on DRI Healthcare stock, see the TSE:DHT.UN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:DHT.UN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:DHT.UN is a Neutral.

DRI Healthcare Trust’s strong balance sheet and effective cash flow management are overshadowed by profitability challenges due to revenue decline and net losses. Technical analysis shows a bearish trend, and valuation concerns arise from negative earnings. However, recent corporate events indicate a positive outlook with improved financial results and strategic management, providing a moderate boost to the overall score.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:DHT.UN stock, click here.

More about DRI Healthcare

DRI Healthcare Trust, managed by DRI Capital Inc., is a leader in global pharmaceutical royalty monetization. Since its IPO in 2021, the Trust has invested over $1.0 billion in acquiring royalties on more than 25 drugs, including Eylea, Orserdu, Omidria, Spinraza, Stelara, Vonjo, Zejula, and Zytiga. The Trust’s units are traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbols ‘DHT.UN’ and ‘DHT.U’.

data.title: Zedge Inc. Earnings Call Highlights Growth and Innovation
data.description:
Zedge Inc ((ZDGE)) has held its Q3 earnings call. Read on for the main highlights of the call.

Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Zedge Inc. Reports Positive Earnings Call with Promising Growth Prospects

The recent earnings call for Zedge Inc. was marked by an overall positive sentiment, as the company reported a return to revenue growth and significant improvements in adjusted EBITDA and subscriber growth. Despite facing challenges such as a decline in GuruShots revenue and restructuring costs, Zedge’s strategic focus on high-value users and new AI initiatives indicates promising potential for future growth.

Return to Revenue Growth

Zedge Inc. marked a notable return to revenue growth in Q3, with total revenue increasing by 1.3% year-over-year to $7.8 million. This growth signifies a positive turnaround for the company, setting a strong foundation for future financial performance.

Significant Increase in Adjusted EBITDA

The company reported a significant 46% year-over-year increase in adjusted EBITDA, reaching $1.2 million. This improvement highlights Zedge’s effective cost management and operational efficiency, contributing to its overall financial health.

Zedge Plus Subscriber Growth

Zedge Plus saw its subscriber base grow to an all-time high of nearly 900,000, reflecting a 37% year-over-year increase. This growth underscores the increasing demand for Zedge’s premium offerings and its ability to attract and retain subscribers.

Deferred Revenue Growth

Deferred revenue experienced substantial growth, reaching $5 million, an 83% increase year-over-year and a 13% sequential rise. This indicates strong future revenue potential as the company continues to expand its services.

Zedge Premium Revenue Surge

Revenue from Zedge Premium more than doubled, driven by the expansion of offerings to web users and increased usage of new features. This surge demonstrates the effectiveness of Zedge’s strategy to enhance its premium services.

Strong Cash Position

Zedge ended the quarter with a robust cash position of $20.4 million and no debt, even after repurchasing 219,000 shares. This financial strength provides the company with flexibility to invest in future growth opportunities.

New AI Initiatives

The launch of Dataseeds.ai, a B2B content marketplace, and the upcoming rollout of an AI audio generator as part of the Paint suite, highlight Zedge’s commitment to innovation. These initiatives are expected to drive future growth and enhance the company’s competitive edge.

GuruShots Revenue Decline

GuruShots experienced a 45% year-over-year revenue decline due to reduced user acquisition spending. This challenge reflects the need for strategic adjustments to revitalize this segment.

Monthly Active Users Decline

There was a decline in monthly active users year-over-year, attributed to a strategic shift away from lower lifetime value users. This move aligns with Zedge’s focus on high-value users in well-developed markets.

Impact of TikTok’s Absence

Revenue growth was restrained due to TikTok’s absence from the U.S. market until mid-February. This external factor posed a temporary challenge to Zedge’s growth trajectory.

Restructuring Charges

The company recorded restructuring charges of $600,000 related to global restructuring and cost reduction efforts. These charges are part of Zedge’s broader strategy to streamline operations and enhance efficiency.

Forward-Looking Guidance

Looking ahead, Zedge plans to continue its growth trajectory by enhancing its platform with AI innovations, expanding its creator community, and launching new features, including an AI audio generator and Dataseeds.ai. The company aims to capitalize on its strong cash position and strategic focus on high-value users to drive future success.

In conclusion, Zedge Inc.’s earnings call reflected a positive outlook, with the company achieving revenue growth and significant improvements in key financial metrics. The strategic focus on high-value users, coupled with innovative AI initiatives, positions Zedge for promising future growth, despite challenges such as the decline in GuruShots revenue and restructuring costs.

data.title: Argyle Resources Extends Marketing Agreement with Euro Digital Media
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Argyle Resources Corp. ( (TSE:ARGL) ) has issued an announcement.

Argyle Resources Corp. has announced the extension of its strategic marketing agreement with Euro Digital Media Ltd. for an additional month, aimed at enhancing its online presence through targeted campaigns and advertising. This extension, costing USD $500,000, reflects Argyle’s commitment to increasing visibility and potentially attracting more stakeholders, without altering its securities structure or ownership dynamics with Euro Digital.

More about Argyle Resources Corp.

Argyle Resources Corp. is a junior mineral exploration company focused on acquiring, exploring, staking, and evaluating natural resource properties in North America. The company holds interests in several projects, including the Frenchvale Graphite Property in Nova Scotia and various silica projects in Quebec, Canada. Argyle is also engaged in a research partnership with the National Institute of Scientific Research (INRS) to conduct exploration programs on its silica projects. Established in 2023, the company is headquartered in Calgary, Alberta, Canada.

data.title: ODDITY Tech Completes $600 Million Notes Offering with Capped Call Transactions
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

ODDITY Tech Ltd. Class A ( (ODD) ) has shared an update.

On June 12, 2025, Oddity Finance LLC, a subsidiary of ODDITY Tech Ltd., completed a private offering of $600 million in 0% Exchangeable Senior Notes due 2030. This offering, which included an option for initial purchasers to buy an additional $75 million in notes, aims to support the company’s financial strategy. Concurrently, Oddity Finance entered into capped call transactions to mitigate potential dilution of ODDITY Tech’s Class A ordinary shares, with a cap set at a 100% premium over the last sale price on NASDAQ. These financial maneuvers are expected to strengthen ODDITY Tech’s market position by providing flexibility in managing its capital structure.

The most recent analyst rating on (ODD) stock is a Hold with a $52.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ODDITY Tech Ltd. Class A stock, see the ODD Stock Forecast page.

Technical indicators support a positive outlook with upward price momentum. Despite a higher P/E ratio, the company’s growth prospects and strategic initiatives, including international expansion and brand development, are compelling. Positive earnings call sentiments further bolster confidence, balancing out valuation concerns.

uniQure ( (QURE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On June 11, 2025, uniQure held its Annual Meeting where shareholders voted on several key proposals. The meeting resulted in the re-election of Matthew Kapusta as executive director and Dr. Robert Gut and Dr. Jeremy Springhorn as non-executive directors, each to serve until the 2028 annual general meeting.
